title: Totally works
review_body: Up until buying this Product we had tried everything - and I mean EVERYTHING. Nothing worked. Natural, home made concoctions , store bought ! You name it and we tried it. Short of dancing around under the moon we covered it all We used this very thoroughly on first application, my daughters hair is loooooooooong ( and I mean it reaches the back of her knees long ) and it is really thick too, hence our major problem of getting rid of the critters. It was a nightmare and I mean a nightmare. We sectioned the hair bit by bit and spent hours going through it . Adding the product and combing it through. It was painstaking but was worth the effort because after one application - it worked ! Critters were gone . Dead . We did a follow up application seven days later , not quite as carefully and then following this we continued to check for about two weeks by combing the hair to make sure we had no escapees . This Product is thick , it's almost like glue ! But blimey does it work. Well worth the money and the effort. Plus , we have loads left and you can see the length of the hair . This product isn't easy to remove , but it's completely non offensive so it doesn't smell or anything , any residue can be completely washed out on a later wash . If you use a spot of fairy liquid and scrub the scalp it does lift . Then shampoo and conditioner as Normal. Her hair was actually amazingly beautiful after all of the product was out and it was re washed and conditioned.

title: Requires washing up liquid to wash out
review_body: Absolutely brilliant. My daughter has very fine, lank, long hair and I was dubious about the oil making her hair ridiculously difficult to wash out, but after 2 washes with washing up liquid, the grease is pretty much gone. As for the treatment itself, there\'s no smell, the comb us easier to hold when your hands are oily so you have a better grip, the first treatment took care of the lice, and I treated her hair again after 48hrs to remove the eggs and she was nit free! Obviously nothings perfect, but id recommend this nit lotion over the other brands on the market. Hope this helps!

title: Amazing product!!
review_body: I've got 2 girls both with long hair and I also have long hair & extensions! I bought 4x bottles after reading the reviews and I'm so glad I purchased this. I've bought all the shop products previously when my daughter had headline before and after spending a fortune trying to find which one would, we ended up just using conditioner and a comb as none of the products in the shop were working! Now, a year later, somehow I have them!!! I didn't want to go and waste money AGAIN and time on products that don't work so I done some research and found this product and I'm so glad I did!!!! I have very long hair & glued in extensions, so could not use the comb as it would pull my extensions out. I thought I would need 2x bottles for my hair. Well, it's easy to apply and goes a long way!! I used 3/4 of a bottle and my hair is very long and thick! Left it on for just over 2 hours. Washed it out with faith liquid twice, then used my normal shampoo & conditioner once after. Washes out fine. Has actually left my hair really soft!! And I've not had one itch on my head since! I could literally feel them crawling on my head 😩 ANYWAY, my hair is now very soft and shiny, clean and nit free!!! This product is by far the best one out there!!!

title: Best product for headlice that Ive used
review_body: Ive been battling headlice for around 5 weeks with my 6 year old daughters hair using the 5min Hedrin and I\'ve tried the 8 hour Hedrin, but a week later my daughter was itching again. I realise she may be cathing them again from school as not all parents will be buying headlice treatment regularly. After spotting nits again i ordered this after reading the good reviews. I thought I\'d use almost the full bottle as her hair is long and thick, but i didn\'t use that much, ive treated her, my son and myself and still have about a third of the bottle left. It goes along way. Washed it out with fairy liquid then shampoo and conditioner. As i was brushing her hair after washing it out the dead lice were dropping out of her hair. Absolutely loads were just falling out, all dead. (The photos are just some of what fell out) So i switched to a nit comb to get them all out. This hasn\'t happened with the hedrin, so in my eyes this is way more effective than Hedrin and the Hedrin didnt go that far, ended up using a full bottle on her and my son when it said it did 6 heads. Im amazed about how effective this really is. I will definitely be buying this in future. Also its left her hair smooth and shiny.

title: Hands down the best treatment ever!!
review_body: Wish I'd found this sooner. After trying 3 different products, constant wet and dry combing every night I couldn't get rid of my Daughters lice. I was at my wits end! Then I heard about superlice and turns out this is what she had. After doing some research I came across this brand and I really wish I'd done so a lot sooner. Product is very thick consistency, compared to like PVA glue. This allowed for easy combing through without the product being dragged out. After one application my Daughters head was lice free. The lice where literally dropping out of her hair as I rinsed it. I do recommend washing the hair twice with plenty of washing up liquid to break down the oiliness you naturally get from lice treatments. The curved end comb that comes with the treatment is the best there is (believe me I've tried loads) the curved edge allows it to really hook onto the hair instead of just dragging lice and eggs around. I've just purchased another bottle to keep at home should she ever get lice again. Can't sing this products praises enough.

title: Recommend

Went on easily and washed out with 2 shampoo rinses - no washing up liquid required. My hair is usually dry and this actually seemed to help win win! The comb is superior to the nitty gritty the blades seemed closer together. Hopefully the little blighters are gone for good!
